title: Characterization Methods
empty_description: Select a characterization method to display information.

open_coax_liquids.title: Open-ended coaxial probe (liquids)
open_coax_liquids.description:
Measures the complex relative permittivity (epsilon_r) of a liquid using an open-ended coaxial probe on a NanoVNA.

The wizard guides you through a four-standard calibration (Open in air, Short, and two reference liquids of known permittivity) at a chosen temperature, then measures the unknown liquid and computes epsilon_r as a function of frequency.

Reference liquids in this version: distilled Water and Isopropyl Alcohol (IPA).
